repos.name: openclawssy
repos.description: PROTOTYPE IN DEVELOPMENT: experimental AI harness/runtime with major rough edges. Do NOT use in production; honestly most people should not use this (or OpenClaw) yet.

repos.name: Roo-Code
repos.description: Roo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.

repos.name: ragussy
repos.description: A universal RAG chatbot with full management UI. Point it at your markdown docs and get an AI-powered Q&A system with complete control over configuration, documents, and vector storage.

repos.name: clawdeck
repos.description: Open source mission control for your OpenClaw agents 🦞

repos.name: uberclawcontrol
repos.description: Open source mission control for your OpenClaw agents 🦞

repos.name: Tchaikovskussy
repos.description: Communication-first multilingual chat with BabelFish-style per-user translation, shared translation caching, and admin-controlled model routing.

repos.name: diffusionchatussy
repos.description: Chat where every message is tone-rewritten by an LLM. Uses Mercury 2 (diffusion LLM) to stream real denoising steps live — watch text resolve from noise into the room's vibe. FastAPI + React + WebSocket.

repos.name: LLM-API-Key-Proxy
repos.description: Universal LLM Gateway: One API, every LLM. OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible endpoints with multi-provider translation and intelligent load-balancing.

repos.name: templeossy
repos.description: Browser-hosted QEMU compiled to WebAssembly for 64-bit x86 guest operating systems

repos.name: dashboardussy
repos.description: A Flask-based VPS operations dashboard for comparing local and remote Linux hosts with movable widgets, network visibility, firewall posture, and Fail2Ban status.

repos.name: fruityboofs
repos.description: Browser-based vocal synth DAW built around Paul Batchelor's WASM engines from pbat.ch/recurse/demos. Step sequencer, transport, MIDI, save/load. We love you Paul.

repos.name: 365compromisesleuth
repos.description: Read-only M365 compromise evidence collection tool for incident response. Collects Entra ID and Exchange Online forensic data into structured case folders.

repos.name: ussycodeproxy
repos.description: ussyco.de webring API + automatic subdomain provisioning service

repos.name: ussyring
repos.description: A simple webring API and embeddable widget. Join the ussy.host + lesbianguide.de webring! Discord: https://discord.gg/6b2Ej3rS3q

repos.name: becomussy
repos.description: A governed continuity system for agent self-development — persistent memory, reflection journals, versioned self-model with semantic diffing, and human-gated revision proposals. Built with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Next.js.

repos.name: llmproxy
repos.description: Universal LLM Gateway: One API, every LLM. OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible endpoints with multi-provider translation and intelligent load-balancing.

repos.name: pfsense
repos.description: Main repository for pfSense

repos.name: openclawremoteussy
repos.description: Production-grade standalone OpenClaw remote gateway integration CLI/service for Openclawssy.

repos.name: roo-code-cloud-alternate-auth
repos.description: Roo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.

repos.name: opencode
repos.description: The open source coding agent.

repos.name: topussy
repos.description: Ussycoded btop-style OpenTUI monitor with multi-host remote mode, process tree, signals, and Linux metrics

repos.name: geoffrussy
repos.description: Go 1.24 AI-driven software delivery orchestrator that guides projects through a staged pipeline (interview → design → plan → review → develop). It uses SQLite (via mattn/go-sqlite3, requires CGO), Cobra for CLI, Bubbletea for TUI, and supports 16 AI providers via an OpenAI-compatible interface pattern.

repos.name: STARDUSTUSSY
repos.description: a security research proof of concept project

repos.name: onno
repos.description: AI-Driven Quality Assurance workspace for OpenClaw. Built in public.

repos.name: warpussy
repos.description: AI-enhanced terminal emulator built as a Go learning project with PTY management and AI integration

repos.name: ralphussy
repos.description: Ralphussy: The Autonomous AI Coding Toolbelt (CLI + TUI + Swarm)

repos.name: rooagussy
repos.description: This is the documentation for Roo Code, an AI-powered autonomous coding agent that lives in your editor.

repos.name: voltronussy
repos.description: A tiny ECS game engine for friends to build games together. Clone, create a game, add your mechanics, submit a PR. No gatekeeping - your game is your sandbox!

repos.name: SwarmCraft
repos.description: Deterministic story-writing engine powered by Grok. Multi-project orchestration with templates + outline grid (threads × parts), RAG memory for long-form continuity, and a scan→plan→execute pipeline with a TUI dashboard.

repos.name: swarmussy
repos.description: Experimental multi-agent orchestration framework for collaborative software development. Implements an intelligent agent swarm for distributed development workflows, paired with an in-progress Python terminal UI dashboard for real-time visualization.

repos.name: rpg-dm-bot
repos.description: AI-powered Discord bot that serves as a Dungeon Master for tabletop RPG games. This entire project was created by giving Claude Opus 4.5 a single prompt asking it to transform ussybot into an RPG DM bot.

repos.name: ussybot
repos.description: Ussyverse Discord 'Project of the Week' first weekend project  BRRR Bot

repos.name: devussy
repos.description: Devussy — interview to DevPlan. Multi‑stage AI planning pipeline with live progress. Generated devplans can be used with any agent by asking them to read handoff and resume development. circular development go brrrrrrrrrrrr!

repos.name: scoreboardussy
repos.description: A real-time, web-based scoreboard for improv shows with dynamic score tracking, audience interaction, and separate control/display panels. Built with React, Node.js, Express, and Socket.IO.

repos.name: devussy-testing
repos.description: Devussy - LLM-based development planning tool with terminal streaming UI

repos.name: slophero
repos.description: ROO GANG - Infra Extraction Horror. Keep the stack alive. Get the man out.

repos.name: iMaCoMpUtERussy
repos.description: The iMaCoMpUtERussy - The legendary 8-bit computer that never existed, brought to life through web technology. Features interactive assembly programming, retro CRT graphics, and the impossible ability to hide entire programs inside YouTube videos. Experience computing as it never was, but always should have been.

repos.name: bananagen
repos.description: CLI tool for generating image assets using Gemini 2.5 Flash

repos.name: pawn-shop-pioneers
repos.description: Pawn Shop Pioneers - An idle/incremental game with crafting, pets, and biome exploration

repos.name: rackspace-spot-tool
repos.description: Interactive deployment automation for VS Code Server on Rackspace Spot cloud infrastructure with spot bidding management, pre-emption handling, and Kubernetes integration.

repos.name: gemini-nano-banana-discord-bot
repos.description: gemini-nano-banana-discord-bot — a Discord bot that generates, edits, and blends images via Gemini Nano Banana using Openrouter API.

repos.name: ArtistSiteussy
repos.description: A production-ready Next.js 14 website template for contemporary artists, featuring bilingual support (English/French), portfolio management, commission requests, event calendar, Stripe-integrated shop functionality, and comprehensive admin panel with dynamic theme customization, social media management, and layout options.

repos.name: familydashboardussy
repos.description: familydashboardussy is a compact, opinionated React + TypeScript app for family planning: weekly tasks, meal planning, and simple grocery lists. Features include multi-user coordination, advanced task management, comprehensive meal planning, real-time synchronization, and mobile-first design.

repos.name: broipussy
repos.description: BROIP Simulator: Bong Rip Over IP Protocol - A groundbreaking application that revolutionizes virtual smoking through advanced networking protocols, enabling distributed inhalation technology.

repos.name: mudussy
repos.description: Modular TypeScript/NestJS MUD engine with plugin architecture, real-time multiplayer (Socket.IO + Telnet), content-driven world/NPCs, branching dialogue sub-prompt, and web SPA client.

repos.name: xcancelussybot
repos.description: 🚀 Discord bot that automatically converts x.com links to xcancel.com

repos.name: 365cspadminussy
repos.description: WARNING: This project is in development. A comprehensive PowerShell-based management toolkit designed for Microsoft CSP partners to efficiently administer and audit customer tenants through GDAP relationships.

repos.name: BackupUSSY
repos.description: 🚧 Experimental project – no stable release. Not production-ready. BackupUSSY is a comprehensive LTO tape archive solution designed for Windows environments. This tool focuses on archival (non-rotating) backups with support for writing to one or two tapes per archive job, ensuring your critical data is preserved with enterprise-grade reliability.

issues.title: [EXPERIMENTAL][ENHANCEMENT] Evaluate and prototype OpenTUI as alternative CLI renderer
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T024: Implement cancel/interrupt flow and command wiring
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T023: Build multiline composer input with submit keybinding parity (`Enter` / modified enter behavior)
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T022: Implement basic scroll viewport + auto-follow on streaming output
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T021: Implement message list rendering (assistant/user/tool) with streaming append behavior
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T020: CI workflow branch for OpenTUI tests and artifact checks
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T019: Create golden fixture streams from existing JSON event emitter for deterministic UI tests
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T018: Establish OpenTUI snapshot/unit test harness and fixture setup
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T017: Add logging/debug toggles (`ROO_OPENTUI_DEBUG`) with non-invasive output behavior
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T016: Wire lifecycle hooks (`start/stop`, cleanup, signals) for OpenTUI renderer
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T015: Ensure print/json modes remain untouched and covered by regression tests
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T014: Add dual-UI flag (`--ui ink/opentui`) to command path in `commands/cli/run.ts`
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T013: Implement store layer for OpenTUI (`zustand` reuse or equivalent)
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T012: Build adapter from `ExtensionClient` events -> VM store (`apps/cli/src/opentui/adapters/clientAdapter.ts`)
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T011: Create UI view-model contracts (`TaskVM`, `MessageVM`, `PromptVM`, `StatusVM`) under `apps/cli/src/opentui/vm`
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T010: Create new UI root `apps/cli/src/opentui/App.tsx` and renderer bootstrap
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T009: Add OpenTUI dependencies and scaffolding package boundaries in `apps/cli`
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T008: Produce migration implementation plan issue set (epics + labels + dependencies)
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T007: Define compatibility terminal matrix (iTerm2, Terminal.app, GNOME Terminal, Windows Terminal, tmux)
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T006: Instrument current CLI UX timings (input latency, render cadence, startup) for benchmark baseline
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T005: Define non-goals for MVP (what parity is deferred)
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T004: Decide target runtime strategy and write ADR `docs/adr/cli-opentui-runtime.md`
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T003: Validate OpenTUI runtime constraints for this repo (Bun-only path vs Node fallback)
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T002: Build feature parity matrix Ink -> OpenTUI primitives/components
[ENHANCEMENT] OpenTUI migration T001: Baseline current Ink UI capabilities inventory (`messages`, `input`, `scroll`, `pickers`, `hotkeys`, `onboarding`) from `apps/cli/src/ui`
[ENHANCEMENT] Improve provider ingestion onboarding and add OpenAI OAuth
